message:
fix: remove stub files and ensure all functionality is real

This commit removes all stub implementations and ensures every command
has a fully functional implementation.

Removed Stubs:
- Delete internal/cli/dashboard_stub.go (stub dashboard command)
- Delete internal/cli/mail_inbox.go (empty placeholder)

All commands now have real, working implementations:
- Dashboard command uses full TUI implementation from internal/tui/dashboard
- Mail inbox command uses full implementation in mail.go
- Robot dashboard outputs real data

Dashboard Enhancements (robot_dashboard.go):
- Restore PrintDashboard with full implementation
- Real data collection from all sources

Dashboard View (dashboard.go):
- Additional view refinements

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,20 +0,0 @@
-package cli
-
-import (
-	"fmt"
-
-	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
-)
-
-// Stub dashboard command to keep builds green when the full TUI dashboard
-// implementation is unavailable in this checkout.
-func newDashboardCmd() *cobra.Command {
-	return &cobra.Command{
-		Use:    "dashboard",
-		Short:  "TUI dashboard (stubbed)",
-		Hidden: true,
-		RunE: func(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
-			return fmt.Errorf("dashboard not available in this build")
-		},
-	}
-}
